content.content: Puerto Rican entrepreneur and politician who is known for having ran for Governor of Puerto Rico in the 2016 elections. She is also a lawyer and an independent candidate. She graduated from high school and enrolled in Puerto Rico University at the age of fifteen where she earned her degree in Business Administration. She gained further attention in 2015 after announcing her bid to run as governor. She is known for having been the first female candidate to run as an Independent party. She has a daughter named Valentina. She shared a photo with singerDraco Rosaat the Long Life Festival in September of 2019.
